privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: PloyKit ('we') values your privacy as an enterprise-grade SaaS platform. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.content: We collect the following types of information: account information (email, name), usage data (plugin installations, feature usage), technical data (device information, IP address).

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
usage.content: We use collected information to provide and improve services, process subscriptions and billing, ensure platform security, and send important notifications.

isolation.title: 3. Data Isolation
isolation.content: We implement user-level data isolation based on Row-Level Security (RLS) to ensure your data is only accessible by authorized parties.

thirdparty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdparty.content: We use third-party services such as Supabase (database and authentication) and Stripe (payment processing). These services comply with strict privacy standards.

cookies.title: 5. Cookie Usage
cookies.content: We use cookies to maintain your login status, remember preferences, and analyze platform usage. You can manage cookies through your browser settings.

security.title: 6. Data Security
security.content: We employ industry-standard encryption, access controls, and security audits to protect your data.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, modify, delete your personal data, export data, or withdraw consent. Please submit requests through our contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to PloyKit! Please read these terms of service carefully. By using our services, you agree to these terms.

service.title: 1. Service Overview
service.content: PloyKit is an enterprise-grade SaaS application platform providing complete infrastructure including plugin systems, permission management, and data isolation.

account.title: 2. Account Management
account.content: You must provide accurate registration information and are responsible for account security. Sharing accounts or engaging in illegal activities is prohibited.

usage.title: 3. Usage Rules
usage.content: You may use platform features, install plugins, and develop applications. However, resource abuse, system attacks, and uploading malicious code are prohibited.

plugins.title: 4. Plugin Developer Terms
plugins.content: Plugin developers must ensure code security and comply with review rules. Ownership of uploaded plugin code remains with developers, but necessary usage rights must be granted to the platform.

billing.title: 5. Subscription and Billing
billing.content: We offer various subscription plans. Fees are charged monthly or annually. Upon cancellation, service terminates at the end of the current billing cycle.

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.content: Platform code and trademarks belong to PloyKit. Your data and uploaded content belong to you.

liability.title: 7. Disclaimer
liability.content: Services are provided 'as is'. We are not liable for indirect losses such as service interruptions or data loss.

changes.title: 8. Terms Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Significant changes will be notified 30 days in advance. Continued use constitutes acceptance of new terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Whether it's product questions, partnership inquiries, or technical support, we're here to listen
